title: Onnuri source-built Jambonz OSS candidate manifest

max_wire_transmissions.description: One initial SIP request plus at most one authenticated request responding to a challenge. UDP retransmissions of the same transaction do not consume another logical request and remain separately bounded by runtime logic.

One initial SIP request plus at most one authenticated request responding to a challenge. UDP retransmissions of the same transaction do not consume another logical request and remain separately bounded by runtime logic.
